description_long: This is a compact, single-story fast food restaurant with a bold orange and white facade, prominently featuring the Little Caesars branding. The front of the building has large glass windows and double doors, allowing visibility into the interior and displaying menu items. The upper facade is characterized by a bright orange parapet with a large, centrally placed Little Caesars logo and the restaurant name in orange letters. The sides and rear of the building are plain, with light-colored walls and a stone-textured base, and small utility windows or access panels. The roof is flat and appears to be made of corrugated or ribbed material, suitable for urban environments. The overall design is functional and modern, with minimal decorative elements aside from the brand signage.
description: A modern, compact Little Caesars fast food restaurant with a bright orange and white facade, large front windows, and prominent branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass windows, and bold Little Caesars signage and logo.
description_view_1: Side view with a plain wall, stone-textured base, and a small access panel or window near the ground.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a featureless wall with a stone-textured base and no visible entrances or signage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a small window near the base and the orange parapet visible at the front.
attribute_signage: Large wall-mounted sign above the entrance with 'Little Caesars' in orange letters, and a menu board visible through the front windows. The signage is bold, centrally placed, and highly visible.
attribute_logo: A large, circular Little Caesars logo is centered above the entrance, featuring the brand's mascot in white and orange with black outlines.
attribute_architectural_style: Contemporary fast food style with a boxy shape, flat roof, bright color blocking, and minimal ornamentation. The design emphasizes brand visibility and accessibility.
